creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2012-01-28 10:29:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/nlarn          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    games/nlarn/files    patch-premake4.lua 
  Log:
  NLarn is a roguelike game and as such a remake of the classic game Larn.
  
  Very noticeable differences to the original so far include:
  
      - advanced user interface
      - extremely different item handling
      - extended monster AI
      - a real town
      - colour
  
  WWW: http://nlarn.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/162393
  Submitted by:   Martin Tournoij <martin@arp242.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1403    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +42 -0     ports/games/nlarn/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/games/nlarn/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/games/nlarn/files/patch-premake4.lua (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/games/nlarn/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/games/nlarn/pkg-plist (new)
